$comment: D-CSUBSET-COMPUTED-GOTO inline-INTO-host witness: a computed-goto threaded interpreter (`&&label`+`goto *p`) whose dispatch function `main` ALSO calls a MULTI-BLOCK inline-eligible helper `adjust` (if/else). Under the `release` shippedPipeline (Inlining ON) `main` is an inline HOST containing BlockAddress+IndirectBr with a multi-block callee in its plan — the exact shape that, before the routing fix, sent `main` through the MultiBlockInliner whose caller-host emit mis-copies the BlockAddress block-id payload (silent miscompile) and aborts on IndirectBr. The fix routes a computed-goto host to the single-block rebuilder (correct remap); `adjust` stays a call. adjust(x)=x>100?x-50:x+3; acc 1 -> adjust(1)=4 -> *2=8 -> adjust(8)=11 -> exit 11. RED-ON-DISABLE: remove the !functionHasComputedGoto guard at the inlining routing and this crashes/miscompiles under --config=release. Witnessed under baseline AND release, x86 + arm64 qemu.
